qualityBar.principle: Modular medieval voxels composed into lit scenes — shops, villages, dungeons, biomes — not single untextured heroes
qualityBar.render: MagicaVoxel models + strong lighting + post (bloom/fog/color grade) as in pack screenshots

source.title: Medieval Theme Voxels Asset Pack
source.author: Fuzzy Man Studios
source.license: free + commercial, modify OK, credit appreciated

pipeline: Export named objects (or batch VOX→GLB per index/name)
Place by scene kit: never one mesh for whole village
GRUDOX/Warlords scene seed references piece names + transforms
